mapper.select:
SELECT pe.SLOT_NUMBER, -- 엔트리 슬롯 번호
op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, op.USER_ID, op.CURRENT_ATTACK, op.CURRENT_DEFENSE,
-- [수정] 변경된 스탯 명칭 적용 op.CURRENT_HP, op.CURRENT_HARASS, op.CURRENT_SPEED,
-- [추가] 강화 스탯 및 컨디션 연승 데이터 매핑 op.ENHANCE_LEVEL AS enhanceLevel, op.ENHANCE_ATTACK AS enhanceAttack, op.ENHANCE_DEFENSE AS enhanceDefense, op.ENHANCE_HP AS enhanceHp, op.ENHANCE_HARASS AS enhanceHarass, op.ENHANCE_SPEED AS enhanceSpeed, op.CONDITION AS condition, op.WIN_STREAK AS winStreak,
op.ACQUIRED_AT, op.CURRENT_RARITY,
p.PLAYER_SEQ, p.PLAYER_NAME, p.RACE, p.RARITY AS "baseRarity", p.PLAYER_IMG_URL, p.PLAYER_COST,
pack.PACK_NAME FROM TBL_PVE_ENTRY pe JOIN TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS op ON pe.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ JOIN TBL_PLAYERS p ON op.PLAYER_SEQ = p.PLAYER_SEQ LEFT JOIN TBL_PACKS pack ON op.ACQUIRED_FROM_PACK_SEQ = pack.PACK_SEQ WHERE pe.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY pe.SLOT_NUMBER ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PVE_ENTRY ( PVE_ENTRY_SEQ, USER_ID, OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, SLOT_NUMBER ) VALUES ( SEQ_PVE_ENTRY.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{ownedPlayerSeq}, #{slotNumber} )
